asset_name: Mini Pixel Font (3x5, ASCII 96 glyph atlas)

context.usage: 3x5 font for small UI labels (relationship level, tooltips).

acceptance_criteria: Font atlas PNG is exactly 96x15px (32 columns × 3px, 3 rows × 5px) with 0px spacing.
Only #1D2B53 pixels and transparency are used; no outlines or shadows.
Glyphs for 'A', 'E', 'O', '0', '8', '?', '!' are visually distinct at 1x scale.
shared_properties: Asset remains readable at 1x scale on the 128x128 playfield.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering keeps the interface crisp without hiding gameplay.
differences: This font asset provides the compact readable text set for labels and bubbles.
Glyphs must stay readable at 1x scale on the 128x128 canvas.
Stroke density must remain low enough for a 3x5 grid.
